title: Google Drive
description: Sync files from Google Drive folders into Tale documents and RAG.

operations.name: list_files
operations.title: List Files in Folder
operations.description: List files in a Google Drive folder, optionally filtered by mime type.

folderId.description: Drive folder ID. The folder ID is the last path segment of the Drive URL (e.g. https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/<folderId>).

mimeTypes.description: Mime types to include (e.g. ["application/pdf"]). Empty/omitted returns all non-folder files.

pageToken.description: Page token from a previous list_files call for pagination.

operations.name: download_file
operations.title: Download File
operations.description: Download a single binary file by Drive fileId and store it in Convex storage. Native Google Workspace formats (Docs/Sheets/Slides) are not supported by this operation.

fileId.description: Drive file ID returned by list_files.

fileName.description: Filename to use when storing the downloaded file.

contentType.description: Mime type to record alongside the stored file.

setupGuide:
1. In the [Google Cloud Console](https://console.cloud.google.com/), create or select a project, then [enable the Google Drive API](https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/library/drive.googleapis.com).
2. On the [OAuth consent screen](https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/credentials/consent), add the scope `https://www.googleapis.com/auth/drive.readonly`. (This is a *restricted* scope — Google may require app verification for production use.)
3. On [Credentials](https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/credentials), create an **OAuth 2.0 Client ID** (Application type: *Web application*). Add an **Authorized redirect URI** that points to this deployment's `/api/integrations/oauth2/callback` path. The path is the same in every environment — only the origin changes:
   - Local dev: `http://localhost:3000/api/integrations/oauth2/callback`
   - Production: `https://<your-domain>/api/integrations/oauth2/callback` (Google requires `https` for production)
   - Sub-path deploy (`BASE_PATH=/tale`): `https://<your-domain>/tale/api/integrations/oauth2/callback`

   You can register all environments you use on the same OAuth client to avoid reconfiguring when switching.
4. Paste the Client ID and Client Secret below, then click **Connect** to start the OAuth flow.
5. Copy the folder ID from the Drive URL (`https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/<folderId>`) when configuring a sync.
